name: obsidian-config-sync
description: Selective, on-demand distribution of vault configuration across devices and vaults

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.smoke:install: npm run build && mkdir -p dev/vault/.obsidian/plugins/config-sync && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css dev/vault/.obsidian/plugins/config-sync/

author: xooooooooox
